usp: Lowest rate for govt employees; pre-approved for salary accounts
weakness: Slow processing for non-salary customers; branch visit mandatory
hdfc_counter_strategy: Faster digital disbursement + pre-approved offers + higher amounts

usp: Instant approval for existing customers; Amazon Pay integration
weakness: High prepayment penalty; lower max amount for non-customers
hdfc_counter_strategy: Flexible tenure + nil prepayment + relationship pricing

usp: Lowest headline rate; PMAY integration; wide branch reach
weakness: Slow processing; heavy documentation; rigid underwriting
hdfc_counter_strategy: Faster TAT (7 days) + doorstep service + digital journey + flexible income assessment

usp: Good digital experience; relationship pricing for HNI
weakness: Higher rate vs SBI; selective on self-employed; higher processing fee
hdfc_counter_strategy: Comparable rate with better service + wider property approval + NRI expertise

usp: Fast processing; dedicated RM; good for salaried premium
weakness: Lower max tenure; conservative LTV; limited branch reach in tier-2
hdfc_counter_strategy: Wider reach + higher LTV + 30-year tenure + PMAY support

usp: Instant digital approval; minimal documentation; flexi loan option
weakness: Very high rate; short tenure; aggressive recovery for defaults
hdfc_counter_strategy: Lower rate + longer tenure + relationship approach + no harassment

usp: Lowest rate; nil processing fee; wide dealer network
weakness: Slow for used cars; limited luxury car expertise
hdfc_counter_strategy: Used car financing + luxury segment expertise + faster processing

usp: Instant approval at dealership; used car expertise
weakness: Higher rate for low scores; limited to metros for premium
hdfc_counter_strategy: Pan-India coverage + competitive rate + doorstep service

usp: Good LTV; accepts commercial property; balance transfer option
weakness: Conservative valuation; slow legal process; limited for lease property
hdfc_counter_strategy: Higher LTV (70%) + faster legal verification + commercial property accepted

usp: Lowest rate; high LTV; accepts agricultural land in some cases
weakness: Very slow processing; rigid valuation; limited for self-employed
hdfc_counter_strategy: Faster processing (10 days) + flexible income proof + doorstep service

usp: Accepts zero credit history; doorstep service in rural; flexible EMI
weakness: Higher rate; aggressive recovery; limited to Mahindra tractors
hdfc_counter_strategy: All brand financing + competitive rate + flexible EMI + digital process

usp: Low rate; high LTV for new vehicles; nil prepay after 1 year
weakness: Slow processing; limited used CV; no flexibility for first-time buyers
hdfc_counter_strategy: Faster TAT + used CV expertise + first-time buyer programs + fleet discount

usp: Zero cost terminal; instant settlement; QR + POS combo; app ecosystem
weakness: No lending relationship; support issues; hidden charges on settlements
hdfc_counter_strategy: Bundled with business loan + lower effective MDR + same-day settlement + dedicated support

usp: Best API; excellent developer docs; widest payment method support
weakness: No offline presence; no relationship banking; purely transactional
hdfc_counter_strategy: Integrated banking + lending + PG bundle + relationship pricing + offline support
